# Belgian Data Protection Act

Jurisdiction: Belgium
Region: BE
Citation: Loi relative à la protection des personnes physiques à l'égard des traitements de données à caractère personnel
Authority: Belgian Data Protection Authority
Source URL: https://www.dataprotectionauthority.be/citizen
Topics: sensitive_data, children_data, law_enforcement, data_subject_rights, accountability
Keywords: Belgian Data Protection Act, APD GBA, GDPR implementation

## Summary
Belgian national act implementing and supplementing GDPR and law-enforcement data protection rules.

## Key compliance obligations
- Apply Belgian national derogations and age rules.
- Assess sensitive and law-enforcement processing under Belgian law.
- Track Belgian DPA enforcement expectations.
